description_long: This is a modern, tactical-style rifle with a matte black finish, featuring a collapsible stock and a prominent pistol grip for ergonomic handling. The rifle has a detachable box magazine inserted in front of the trigger guard, and a flat-top upper receiver with a Picatinny rail for mounting optics or accessories. The barrel is of standard length and appears to be free-floating, with a simple flash hider at the muzzle. The handguard is ribbed and equipped with additional rail sections for accessory attachment. The overall design is compact and modular, suitable for urban environments and close-quarters use. The construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components for weight reduction and durability.
description: A modern black tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, pistol grip, detachable magazine, and accessory rails, designed for urban use. The rifle features a standard barrel and a matte finish.
description_view_0: The rifle is viewed directly from the front, showing the narrow barrel profile and the flash hider at the muzzle.
description_view_1: A full left-side profile of the rifle, displaying the collapsible stock, pistol grip, magazine, and accessory rails along the handguard and receiver.
description_view_2: The rifle is viewed directly from the rear, highlighting the stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_3: A full right-side profile of the rifle, mirroring the left side and showing the same key features including the collapsible stock and magazine.
